images.alt: A hyper-realistic fashion editorial photograph in 4:5 vertical format showing a surreal white marble gallery filled with floating circular portal frames. Each portal displays a Hollywood-style bald male model with a thick beard, sunglasses and strong masculine presence, captured in expressive cinematic poses—smirking, serious, contemplative, or looking away dramatically. Lighting & Color: Soft diffused daylight mixed with golden hour glow, white marble reflections, warm beige tones, soft shadow gradients, subtle emerald and navy undertones inside portals. Technical Details: 85mm lens, ultra-detailed facial structure, natural skin pores visible, shallow depth of field, luxury editorial magazine aesthetic, clean minimal composition, ultra-realistic 4K, no text.

images.alt: A highly detailed monochrome fantasy illustration of a serpentine dragon coiled around a dreamcatcher, rendered in silver-gray tones against a pure black background. The dragon wraps its scaled body around the circular woven hoop, with large bat-like wings spread to the left and its horned head positioned to the right. The dreamcatcher features an intricate geometric web pattern with a central sphere and small bead accents. Below the hoop hang three large feathers adorned with beads, and a smaller coiled dragon curls at the base of the central feather strand. The overall aesthetic resembles a detailed relief sculpture or tattoo design. Dark fantasy art style, studio lighting, high contrast, photorealistic rendering

images.alt: A majestic golden dragon coiled in a dynamic S-curve pose against a pure black background, rendered in intricate engraved linework with rich gold and amber tones. The dragon has large feathered-bat wings partially spread, detailed overlapping scales and plumage, and a fierce horned head exhaling a glowing orb of fire. Its serpentine tail curls downward and ends in a burst of realistic golden flames. The creature is surrounded by a circular arcane ring engraved with runic scripts, ancient glyphs, and mystical inscriptions in glowing gold. The overall style combines dark fantasy illustration with ornate filigree detail, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, and a luminous inner glow emanating from the fire elements. Ultra-detailed, cinematic, high contrast.

images.alt: A seated humanoid android inside a rugged transport cabin, with segmented gunmetal armor, rounded shoulder plates, articulated hands, scratched chest panels, muddy speckling across the helmet and limbs, black cable bundles, exposed neck actuators, and a single red optical sensor set into the side of the head; the figure sits in three-quarter profile against a worn interior wall of riveted panels, overhead hoses, dangling cables, scuffed ceiling plates, and a rectangular open door revealing a sunlit desert canyon with pale sand, scrub, and red rock formations outside; hard warm daylight enters from the right through the open bay, cutting bright highlights across chipped metal edges, glass optics, finger joints, dust-stained armor seams, and the robot’s knee plates, while the cabin interior falls into cooler mechanical shadow with readable grime and surface wear; photographed as a cinematic sci-fi vehicle interior portrait with a 50mm lens at f/2.8, sharp focus on the helmet, red sensor, torso plating, and resting hands, moderate depth of field, desert background softly blurred through the doorway, diagonal cable framing, grounded seated posture, restrained steel, ocher, black, and desert tan palette, soft highlight rolloff, tactile microtexture, believable armor weight, and physically plausible contact between seat, limbs, hoses, cabin panels, dust, and exterior light.

images.alt: A centered vertical portrait of an androgynous humanoid android with the face split cleanly down the middle, the left side formed from cracked matte white ceramic with fine fracture lines, a natural pale eye, bare shoulder, and smooth sculpted features, while the right side exposes dark graphite mechanical plating, dense cable bundles, small orange indicator lights, segmented neck hardware, and a glowing amber optical lens set inside a circular metal socket; the head and shoulders fill the foreground, aligned symmetrically against a distant city skyline under heavy gray storm clouds, with warm sunset light glowing along the horizon and small bird silhouettes crossing the upper sky; cool overcast light softens the ceramic side and reveals powdery surface texture, while the mechanical side catches tighter specular highlights along screws, seams, polished plates, and insulated cables, with amber electronics adding localized warmth; photographed as a cinematic close portrait with a 100mm lens at f/2.2, sharp focus on both eyes and the central split line, shallow depth of field, softly blurred skyscrapers, balanced frontal composition, restrained porcelain, gunmetal, blue-gray, and ember palette, soft highlight rolloff, tactile microtexture, believable skin-like ceramic cracking, precise mechanical layering, and physically plausible contact between face plates, cables, neck assemblies, and atmospheric dusk light.

images.alt: Create new image, resolution 2056x1329. A breathtaking watercolor-style digital painting of a rainy evening on a cobblestone street in a historic European city. Two solitary figures walk along a reflective wet street, each holding a vivid red umbrella, surrounded by elegant multi-story classical buildings with glowing amber and orange windows. Ornate Victorian-style cast iron lampposts cast warm golden halos through the misty rain. In the misty background, gothic church spires rise dramatically into a moody blue-grey overcast sky. The rain-soaked street mirrors the warm lights of the buildings and lanterns in luminous orange and gold reflections. A blue striped awning and lush window box plants add detail to the left facade. The atmosphere blends melancholy solitude with urban warmth — cold blue mist contrasting with the inviting glow of inhabited spaces. Painted with loose expressive brushwork, ink linework, and vibrant watercolor washes.

images.alt: Hyper-detailed dark fantasy comic book style illustration of a beautiful mysterious woman in three-quarter back pose, glancing over her shoulder toward the viewer with a confident, intense gaze. Long wild black hair swept up loosely with flowing strands cascading down her back. Intricate ornamental face tattoo on her forehead featuring a jeweled teardrop centerpiece with scrollwork. Neck tattoos visible. Full detailed sleeve tattoo on her right arm depicting a dark female face surrounded by swirling ornamental designs, floral motifs, and a mystical orb. Wearing a sleeveless black leather fitted outfit with studded collar neckline. Dangling gemstone earring. Dark teal and navy blue moonlit background with a large circular moon halo behind her head, subtle cloudy atmosphere. Black thorned branches framing the lower edges. Rich shadows, dramatic rim lighting, high contrast. Art style reminiscent of comic book cover art — fluid ink lines, painterly shading, cinematic composition. Dark fantasy, gothic warrior goddess aesthetic.
